➢   This report is valid for 36 months from the date of report.
➢   This vendor assessment report is confidential and is addressed only to the intended recipient.
➢   This information shall not be made available to third parties or any other person, entity or organization without the permission of the GeM or
the verification agency.
➢   The vendor assessment report is based on the information provided by the vendor on GeM Portal and to the verification agency portal which
are considered to be truthful, precise and accurate.
➢   GeM reserves the rights for any surveillance/Physical assessment of the vendor.
➢   The responsibility for the accuracy, completeness or adequacy of any information on which report is based, lies with the vendor.
➢   RITES accept no liability for the contents of this report or for the consequences of any actions taken on the basis of information provided in
the report. Vendor Assessment is not an audit and this report is not in any way a recommendation for entering into any kind of
transaction/commitment/agreement etc. with entity.
➢   RITES accepts no responsibility, whatsoever, for any loss or damage from the use of any information given in the report and nothing
contained in the report is liable or intended to create any legally binding obligations, financial or any other liability whatsoever on RITES, it's
leadership or persons/organizations involved in vendor assessment .
1. Video assessment was conducted with Shri Sadanand Malviya, Finance Head of the applicant's firm, and Ms. Ambika Negi, GM of
Corporate Affairs, along with Shri Jitender Mulchandani, GM of Manufacturing at the Contract Manufacturing firm.
2. Video, pictorial evidence and geo-tagged location have been recorded successfully during video assessment.
3. Firm’s address, manufacturing process, machine/equipment & infrastructure have been verified. 
4. Video Assessment has been conducted successfully.
Recommendation- Based on the Vendor Assessment, Vendor has been assessed as an “OEM” satisfactorily.
